title: Verify existing implementation of auth middleware
description: The auth middleware with JWT validation is already fully implemented. The implementation includes: createAuthMiddleware factory in src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts that extracts Bearer tokens, validates JWTs, attaches user payload to context, and returns 401 for invalid/missing tokens. Comprehensive unit tests exist in src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts covering all required cases (valid token, missing header, malformed token, expired token). The withAuth HOC in src/auth/withAuth.ts provides composability with route handlers.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: Factory pattern (createAuthMiddleware) for dependency injection
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC wrapper pattern for composing auth with route handlers
src/auth/jwt-service.ts: JWT sign/verify with TokenPayload type
